hypothesis: If a diffusion-based generative model for composite formulations is trained with non-negativity and sum-to-one physics regularizers, then it will yield higher Validityreg and Validityfab and equal or better Density/Coverage than unconstrained CVAE and TabDDPM baselines on the carbon composite dataset because constraining the diffusion process to the physically admissible simplex biases generation toward feasible, physically consistent compositions.
